Access

Getting to Kamiyama.

Kamiyama sits in central Tokushima, west of Tokushima City. Plan for roughly 50–60 minutes by car or bus from Tokushima Awaodori Airport or JR Tokushima Station.

Map

Where we are

© OpenStreetMap contributors

Location
Kamiyama, Myozai, Tokushima, Japan
By air
~60 min by car from Tokushima Awaodori Airport
By train + bus
~60 min by local bus from JR Tokushima Station
By car
~45 min from Tokushima IC via local roads

Times are approximate. Please confirm the exact address on the official site.

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

An unofficial introduction to Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology, a private KOSEN located in Kamiyama, Tokushima, Japan.
